system.description:
Beyond the Ringing Mountains are jungles that flourish in rains unheard of. The undisputed rulers of these jungles are the halflings. Standing no more than 3.5 feet in height, they are muscled like humans but with the faces of wise and beautiful children.

Hide in Wilderness: In the wilderness, a halfling can hide with a 90% chance of success. In dungeons, a 2-in-6 chance

Missile Weapon Bonus: Halflings' keen coordination grants them a +1 bonus to attack rolls with all missile weapons

Backstab: When attacking an unaware opponent from behind, a halfling receives a +4 bonus to hit and doubles any damage dealt

Enemy Brutalization: When halflings make the final blow to an enemy, they may brutalize that victim's corpse to intimidate other creatures, giving them a -1 penalty to their morale

Large Opponent Defense: Due to their small size, halflings gain a +2 bonus to Armor Class when attacked by large opponents (greater than human-sized)

Tribal Leadership: The halfling may create a tribe with a minimum of 20 other halflings, following the culture and moral codes of the halflings and building a stronghold on forest lands

class.weapons: All weapons appropriate to their stature (cannot use longbows or two-handed swords)
